title: Harden cancellation, status semantics, and capability routing
description: Address final-review should-fix findings: terminate child process trees, await shutdown settlement where possible, classify awaiting/failed/completed manifests and in_progress as active status correctly, and implement deterministic economy/balanced/strong routing from explicit tick metadata/shape without pretending unavailable roles work.
acceptance_criteria: Cancellation kills fixture descendants; status distinguishes active/awaiting/failed/completed cleanup debt; in_progress counts as running; ordinary tick routing can select economy/balanced/strong deterministically with tests and documented policy.
